name: Junior Keeper
description: A dedicated animal caretaker. Feeds animals and maintains exhibit cleanliness.

name: Senior Keeper
description: Experienced keeper with expertise in animal care and breeding.

name: Janitor
description: Keeps visitor areas clean. Maintains restrooms, bins, and public spaces.

name: Maintenance Worker
description: Repairs fences and maintains facilities. Prevents animal escapes.

name: Senior Keeper
description: Experienced keeper with advanced animal care skills. Handles 3x more animals.

name: Head Janitor
description: Leads the cleaning team. Cleans 3x more exhibits than regular janitors.

name: Veterinarian
description: Medical professional who treats sick animals faster and prevents outbreaks.
